            # Iterate over all possible letters for the m-th character in the generated string

                temp_lcs = [[0] * (N + 1) for _ in range(m + 1)]

                    for j in range(N):

                # Update dp[m] with the resulting LCS lengths
                for lcs in range(N + 1):
                    dp[m][lcs] = (dp[m][lcs] + dp[m-1][prev_lcs]) % MOD

    # Now, collect the answers for all k from 0 to N
    ans = [0] * (N + 1)
    for k in range(N + 1):
        ans[k] = dp[M][k] % MOD
